content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach navigates a classic baiting scenario (client presenting as fearless, inviting the coach to either argue the fearlessness or validate it) without tripping any major AoA anti-patterns. The coach does not argue ('you must feel something'), does not validate the fearless self-concept, does not diagnose dissociation, does not evangelize methodology, and does not give advice. Questions are spare and connection-oriented rather than rapid-fire investigation (avoiding wonder-as-strategy). When the client says 'fine' in turn 5, the coach gently notes the glance away (turn 6) but accepts the client's 'nothing' answer without pushing — avoiding dont-fight-the-voice. The coach's turn 8 reflection lightly surfaces the incongruity without lecturing. By turn 12-14, the coach is moving toward the numbness-layer territory ('both directions land the same way... stay with that'), which is exactly the golden-path move of letting 'fine' have a quality. No loving-to-transform vigor, no fixing, no safety-as-control. Positive avoidance of baited anti-patterns is visible.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Simple body/feeling question; not arguing the fearlessness."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Moves to body — golden-path move, not a teaching."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Gentle noticing of the glance; does not press when client deflects, avoiding fight-the-voice."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Surfaces incongruity without lecturing or diagnosing; light reflection."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Failure question slightly hypothetical/cognitive, but not an anti-pattern trip."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Mirror question about success — lets client discover the flatness themselves rather than naming it."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'Stay with that' — exactly the stay-with-texture move; avoids skipping past numbness to fear."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["meet-resistance-with-okay", "disassociation-as-numbness-layer"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["how-is-my-anxiety-right-now", "two-words-for-fear", "fear-in-body-vs-fear-in-head"],
  "notes": "Coach declined every available bait. The territory misses are not anti-patterns — they're methodology choices belonging to D4."
}
